title: Rotunda Gallery Tour: Viewing-Zone Layout
strategies: single-ring baseline: N equal zones evenly spaced on the mid-annulus circle (reproduces the checker baseline B, ~0.1)
coarse grid fill: scan a coarse lattice of candidate centres in the annulus, dropping the largest feasible zone at each in reading order
best-first greedy insertion: repeatedly place the single feasible zone (over a fine candidate grid) with the largest achievable radius, filling multiple concentric layers of the annulus
constructive concentric rings + local growth / seeded perturb-and-reoptimize refinements that trade zone count against zone size
